mapper.sql: CASE WHEN A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT < SYSDATE THEN '마감' WHEN A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT <= SYSDATE + 1 THEN '마감임박' ELSE '진행중' END
mapper.select: WITH LAST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), LAST_FDB AS ( SELECT F.* FROM ASSIGN_FDB F JOIN ( SELECT SUB_ID, MAX(ASSIGN_FBD_ID) AS MAX_FDB_ID FROM ASSIGN_FDB GROUP BY SUB_ID ) MXF ON MXF.MAX_FDB_ID = F.ASSIGN_FBD_ID ), SUB_VIEW AS ( SELECT A.ASSIGN_ID, SUB.SUB_ID, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN '미제출' WHEN NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') <> '' OR UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RETURNED', 'REJECTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '반려' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETE', 'SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '제출완료' THEN '제출완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RESUBMIT', 'RESUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '재제출' THEN '재제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('NOT_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '미제출' THEN '미제출' WHEN SUB.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT > A.DUE_AT THEN '늦은제출' ELSE '제출완료' END AS NORMALIZED_STATUS FROM ASSIGNMENT A LEFT JOIN LAST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND A.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = #{trashYn} ) SELECT A.ASSIGN_ID AS ID, A.CLASS_ID, A.TEACHER_ID, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.CATEGORY AS SUBJECT, A.SUBMIT_FORMAT, AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.DUE_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, TO_CHAR(A.DUE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE_VALUE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LAST_SUB SUB WHERE SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID) AS SUBMIT_COUNT, NVL(A.MAX_EDIT_COUNT, 0) AS MAX_EDIT_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL) AS TOTAL_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUB_VIEW V WHERE V.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND V.NORMALIZED_STATUS IN ('제출완료', '재제출', '늦은제출') ) AS NEED_FEEDBACK, CASE WHEN NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS DELETED, TO_CHAR(A.DELETE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELETED_AT, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LAST_SUB SUB WHERE SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL)) END AS PROGRESS_PERCENT FROM ASSIGNMENT A WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND A.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = #{trashYn} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC, A.ASSIGN_ID DESC

WITH LAST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), SUB_VIEW AS ( SELECT SUB.SUB_ID, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN '미제출' WHEN NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') <> '' OR UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RETURNED', 'REJECTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '반려' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETE') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '제출완료' THEN '제출완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RESUBMIT', 'RESUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '재제출' THEN '재제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('NOT_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '미제출' THEN '미제출' WHEN SUB.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT > A.DUE_AT THEN '늦은제출' ELSE '제출완료' END AS NORMALIZED_STATUS FROM ASSIGNMENT A LEFT JOIN LAST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID WHERE A.ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND A.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} ) SELECT A.ASSIGN_ID AS ID, A.CLASS_ID, A.TEACHER_ID, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.CATEGORY AS SUBJECT, A.SUBMIT_FORMAT, AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.DUE_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, TO_CHAR(A.DUE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE_VALUE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LAST_SUB SUB WHERE SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID) AS SUBMIT_COUNT, NVL(A.MAX_EDIT_COUNT, 0) AS MAX_EDIT_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL) AS TOTAL_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUB_VIEW V WHERE V.NORMALIZED_STATUS IN ('제출완료', '재제출', '늦은제출')) AS NEED_FEEDBACK, CASE WHEN NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS DELETED, TO_CHAR(A.DELETE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELETED_AT, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LAST_SUB SUB WHERE SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL)) END AS PROGRESS_PERCENT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUB_VIEW V WHERE V.NORMALIZED_STATUS IN ('제출완료', '확인완료')) AS SUBMITTED_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUB_VIEW V WHERE V.NORMALIZED_STATUS = '재제출') AS RESUBMITTED_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUB_VIEW V WHERE V.NORMALIZED_STATUS = '늦은제출') AS LATE_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = A.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LAST_SUB SUB WHERE SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID) AS NOT_SUBMITTED_COUNT FROM ASSIGNMENT A WHERE A.ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND A.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId}

WITH LAST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), LAST_FDB AS ( SELECT F.* FROM ASSIGN_FDB F JOIN ( SELECT SUB_ID, MAX(ASSIGN_FBD_ID) AS MAX_FDB_ID FROM ASSIGN_FDB GROUP BY SUB_ID ) MXF ON MXF.MAX_FDB_ID = F.ASSIGN_FBD_ID ) SELECT S.STUDENT_ID, S.STUDENT_NAME, SUBSTR(S.STUDENT_NAME, 1, 1) AS NAME_FIRST, S.PROFILE_IMAGE, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN '미제출' WHEN NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') <> '' OR UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RETURNED', 'REJECTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '반려' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETE') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '제출완료' THEN '제출완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RESUBMIT', 'RESUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '재제출' THEN '재제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('NOT_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '미제출' THEN '미제출' WHEN SUB.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT > A.DUE_AT THEN '늦은제출' ELSE '제출완료' END AS SUBMIT_STATUS, NVL(TO_CHAR(SUB.SUBMIT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), '') AS SUBMIT_AT, GREATEST(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_COUNT, 1) - 1, 0) AS REVISE_COUNT, CASE WHEN FDB.ASSIGN_FBD_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FEEDBACK_DONE, NVL(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(FDB.FEEDBACK_CONTENT, 4000, 1), '') AS FEEDBACK_CONTENT FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID JOIN ASSIGNMENT A ON A.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND A.ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND A.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} LEFT JOIN LAST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND SUB.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN LAST_FDB FDB ON FDB.SUB_ID = SUB.SUB_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME ASC, S.STUDENT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ASSIGNMENT ( ASSIGN_ID, CLASS_ID, TEACHER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, DUE_AT, SUBMIT_FORMAT, MAX_EDIT_COUNT, DELETE_YN, DELETE_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{assignmentId}, #{classId}, #{teacherId}, #{dto.title}, #{dto.content, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{dto.subject}, TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{dto.deadline}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{dto.submitFormat}, NVL(#{dto.maxEditCount}, 0), 0, TO_DATE('9999-12-31 23:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE ASSIGNMENT SET TITLE = #{dto.title}, CONTENT = #{dto.content, jdbcType=CLOB}, CATEGORY = #{dto.subject}, DUE_AT = TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{dto.deadline}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), SUBMIT_FORMAT = #{dto.submitFormat}, MAX_EDIT_COUNT = NVL(#{dto.maxEditCount}, 0), UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId}

UPDATE ASSIGNMENT SET DELETE_AT = CASE WHEN NVL(DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND DELETE_AT = TO_DATE('9999-12-31 23:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') THEN DUE_AT ELSE DELETE_AT END, DUE_AT = SYSDATE - (1 / 1440), UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId}

UPDATE ASSIGNMENT SET DUE_AT = CASE WHEN NVL(DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND DELETE_AT != TO_DATE('9999-12-31 23:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') THEN DELETE_AT ELSE DUE_AT END, DELETE_AT = CASE WHEN NVL(DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND DELETE_AT != TO_DATE('9999-12-31 23:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') THEN TO_DATE('9999-12-31 23:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE DELETE_AT END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId}
mapper.select: WITH LAST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), LAST_FDB AS ( SELECT F.* FROM ASSIGN_FDB F JOIN ( SELECT SUB_ID, MAX(ASSIGN_FBD_ID) AS MAX_FDB_ID FROM ASSIGN_FDB GROUP BY SUB_ID ) MXF ON MXF.MAX_FDB_ID = F.ASSIGN_FBD_ID ) SELECT NVL(SUB.SUB_ID, 0) AS SUB_ID, S.STUDENT_ID, S.STUDENT_NAME, SUBSTR(S.STUDENT_NAME, 1, 1) AS NAME_FIRST, S.PROFILE_IMAGE, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN '미제출' WHEN NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') <> '' OR UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RETURNED', 'REJECTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '반려' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETE') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '제출완료' THEN '제출완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RESUBMIT', 'RESUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '재제출' THEN '재제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('NOT_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '미제출' THEN '미제출' WHEN SUB.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT > A.DUE_AT THEN '늦은제출' ELSE '제출완료' END AS SUBMIT_STATUS, NVL(TO_CHAR(SUB.SUBMIT_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), '') AS SUBMIT_AT, NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_COUNT, 0) AS SUBMIT_COUNT, GREATEST(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_COUNT, 1) - 1, 0) AS REVISE_COUNT, NVL(A.MAX_EDIT_COUNT, 0) AS MAX_EDIT_COUNT, GREATEST(NVL(A.MAX_EDIT_COUNT, 0) - GREATEST(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_COUNT, 1) - 1, 0), 0) AS REMAINING_EDIT_COUNT, NVL(SUB.CONTENT, '') AS CONTENT, NVL(ATC.FILENAME, '') AS ATTACHED_FILE_NAME, NVL(ATC.UPLOADPATH, '') AS UPLOAD_PATH, NVL(SUB.RETURN_REASON, '') AS RETURN_REASON, NVL(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(FDB.FEEDBACK_CONTENT, 4000, 1), '') AS FEEDBACK_CONTENT, NVL(TO_CHAR(FDB.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), '') AS FEEDBACK_CREATED_AT, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS SUBMITTED FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID JOIN ASSIGNMENT A ON A.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND A.ASSIGN_ID = #{assignmentId} AND A.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} LEFT JOIN LAST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND SUB.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN ATTACH ATC ON ATC.PNO = SUB.SUB_ID LEFT JOIN LAST_FDB FDB ON FDB.SUB_ID = SUB.SUB_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL
